name: HEARTLAND EXPRESS INC
summary: Heartland Express, Inc. is a Nevada holding company operating as a short, medium, and long-haul truckload carrier providing nationwide asset-based dry van truckload service for major shippers across the U.S. Services include temperature-controlled transportation and Mexico cross-border logistics via third-party partnerships. Operating under brands Heartland Express, Millis Transfer, Smith Transport, and CFI, the company reports consolidated average length of haul under 400 miles and generated $805.7 million in revenue for 2025.

products.name: Dry Van Truckload Service
products.description: Nationwide asset-based dry van truckload transportation for major shippers across the U.S.

products.name: Temperature-Controlled Transportation
products.description: Truckload temperature-controlled transportation services, not significant to consolidated operations.

products.name: Mexico Logistics Services
products.description: Cross-border freight and logistics services into Mexico offered through third-party partnerships.

partnerships.description: Third-party partnerships used to provide cross-border freight and logistics services into Mexico.
